questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Internet Routing?
options: Inefficient scaling of Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) path-vector evaluations.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) path-vector evaluations.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) path-vector evaluations scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
